name: pennylane
tagline: Reference skill teaching PennyLane quantum-ML usage: pinned installs, circuit/VQE/optimizer code samples, links to bundled reference docs.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped reference skill. Installs only official PennyLaneAI/plugin packages via pinned `uv pip install`, no credential access, no remote code execution, no hidden or manipulative text. Minor gaps: no troubleshooting/failure-path guidance and no explicit output contract, and the hardware-switch example implicitly assumes the user already has IBM Qu

highlights.summary: No troubleshooting or failure-path section (e.g., what to do if a hardware plugin's dependency conflicts, or if the QPU job fails) despite the install section itself warning Qiskit's dependency graph
